steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The dash introduces an example showing tourists can “easily recognize” the Spanish architectural influence in buildings. This signals the influence is conspicuous and evident.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Palpable means obvious or easily perceived—fitting the passage's evidence that tourists readily recognize the Spanish influence.
The other three don't fit: corroborated refers to confirming a claim (not describing an influence), understated contradicts the visible example, and disputed implies controversy unsupported in the passage.
That confirms D is correct.
